holdings.infoBox: SIXS is an equity ETF with a total of 84 individual holdings. The top holdings are Horace Mann Educators stock at 2.49%, Enact Holdings at 2.25%, Innoviva at 2.22%, HCI Group at 2.11%, and Cal-Maine Foods at 1.98%.

overview.description: The ETC 6 Meridian Small Cap Equity ETF (SIXS) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund is a portfolio of US small-caps with low beta and value characteristics, actively selected from the S&P 600. SIXS was launched on May 11, 2020 and is issued by Exchange Traded Concepts.
